results.alt: MicroCosmos is a scientific exploration platform dedicated to revealing the extraordinary world that exists beyond the limits of the naked eye. From single-celled organisms dancing in a drop of water to the intricate lattice of a snowflake crystal, we document and celebrate the microscopic wonders that form the foundation of all life. The Universe Beneath Our Feet
